name: scan-security
description: Run a security scan. Uses bandit (Python), npm audit (Node/TS), govulncheck (Go), cargo audit (Rust), dotnet list package --vulnerable (C#), OWASP dependency-check (Java), helm audit (Helm), tfsec/checkov (Terraform). Falls back to grep-based credential scan. Read-only.

scope.description: Advisory hint: if provided, the calling agent should pass this as the target path to the framework scanner directly (e.g. bandit -r path/). The default invocation scans the entire project.

args: if [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then python -m bandit -r . 2>/dev/null || echo '[security] Install bandit: pip install bandit'; elif [ -f package.json ]; then npm audit; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then govulncheck ./... 2>/dev/null || go vet ./...; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo audit 2>/dev/null || cargo check; elif find . -maxdepth 2 -name '*.csproj' 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then dotnet list package --vulnerable 2>/dev/null || echo '[security] Run: dotnet list package --vulnerable (requires .NET 5+)'; elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then mvn org.owasp:dependency-check-maven:check 2>/dev/null || echo '[security] Add OWASP dependency-check-maven plugin'; elif [ -f build.gradle ] || [ -f build.gradle.kts ]; then ./gradlew dependencyCheckAnalyze 2>/dev/null || echo '[security] Add org.owasp.dependencycheck plugin to build.gradle'; elif [ -f Chart.yaml ]; then command -v kubesec >/dev/null 2>&1 && kubesec scan . || helm template . 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'privileged\|hostPID\|hostNetwork\|runAsRoot' || echo '[security] Install kubesec for Helm security scanning'; elif ls ./*.tf >/dev/null 2>&1; then command -v tfsec >/dev/null 2>&1 && tfsec . || command -v checkov >/dev/null 2>&1 && checkov -d . || echo '[security] Install tfsec: brew install tfsec  or checkov: pip install checkov'; elif [ -f composer.json ]; then command -v composer >/dev/null 2>&1 && composer audit 2>/dev/null || echo '[security] Run: composer audit (requires Composer 2.4+)'; elif [ -f Gemfile ]; then command -v bundler-audit >/dev/null 2>&1 && bundle-audit check --update || echo '[security] Install bundler-audit: gem install bundler-audit'; else grep -rn --include='*.py' --include='*.js' --include='*.ts' --include='*.go' --include='*.cs' --include='*.java' --include='*.php' --include='*.rb' --include='*.swift' --include='*.cpp' --include='*.c' -E '(password|secret|api_key|token)\s*=\s*["'\'']{1}[^"'\'']{8,}' . 2>/dev/null | grep -v '.git' | grep -v 'test' || echo 'No obvious hardcoded secrets found.'; fi
